FELLOWSHIP
HIGH SCHOOL
LUGAZI

P.O.BOX 276 LUGAZI

Welcome to Fellowship High School. This area uses cream and blue as the color theme.

Location: Bulyantete 2 — half a kilometre from Lugazi Town; 1.5 kilometres off the Lugazi–Jinja Highway, Buikwe District.

Information about secondary classes, curriculum, and admissions will appear here.

Fly Higher

Highlights & Values

  • Is a Christian founded school — mixed, boarding & day.
  • Driven by academic excellence & Christian discipline.
  • Promotes co-curricular activities.
  • Quite spacious in a well preserved green environment.
  • Qualified & caring staff.
Fellowship Schools — Fly Higher
